title: Innovation analysis
subtitle: Short sward grazing (Kurzrasenweide)
description: A technical analysis of an innovative short sward grazing system integrating barn-dried hay, a dehumidifier, and a photovoltaic plant to improve forage quality and reduce input costs. It outlines the prerequisites, strengths, and economic, social, environmental, technological, legal, and political factors influencing the adoption of this sustainable livestock farming practice.
